Bash(node -e "const d = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('data/stacks.json','utf-8'\)\); console.log\('Total tools:', d.tools.length\); const cats = {}; d.tools.forEach\(t => { cats[t.category] = \(cats[t.category]||0\)+1 }\); console.log\('Categories:', JSON.stringify\(cats, null, 2\)\); const ai = d.tools.filter\(t => t.category === 'ai_builders'\); console.log\('AI Builders:', ai.map\(t => t.name\).join\(', '\)\); const nc = ai.filter\(t => t.noCode\); console.log\('No-code AI builders:', nc.map\(t => t.name\).join\(', '\)\);")

Bash(curl -sN -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/stack \\
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \\
  -d '{"idea":"app that calculates calories by taking a photo of food","budget":"bootstrap","techLevel":"nocode"}' \\
  --max-time 120 2>&1)

Bash(curl -sN -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/stack \\
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \\
  -d '{"idea":"app that calculates calories by taking a photo of food","budget":"bootstrap","techLevel":"nocode"}' \\
  --max-time 120 2>&1 | grep -o '"text":"[^"]*"' | sed 's/"text":"//;s/"$//' | tr -d '\\n' | python3 -c "
import sys, json
raw = sys.stdin.read\(\)
# Find JSON block
start = raw.find\('{'\)
end = raw.rfind\('}'\) + 1
if start >= 0 and end > start:
    data = json.loads\(raw[start:end]\)
    for i, phase in enumerate\(data.get\('phases', []\)\):
        tools = [t['name'] for t in phase.get\('tools', []\)]
        print\(f\\"{phase['name']}: {', '.join\(tools\)}\\"\)
    print\(\)
    print\('Upgrades mentioning AI builders:'\)
    for u in data.get\('upgrades', []\):
        if any\(x in u.get\('migrateTo',''\) for x in ['Lovable','Bolt','v0']\):
            print\(f\\"  {u['tool']} → {u['migrateTo']}\\"\)
    for s in data.get\('scalability', []\):
        if any\(x in s.get\('upgradeTo',''\) for x in ['Lovable','Bolt','v0']\):
            print\(f\\"  Scale: {s['trigger']} → {s['upgradeTo']}\\"\)
")

Bash(curl -sN -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/stack \\
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \\
  -d '{"idea":"app that calculates calories by taking a photo of food","budget":"bootstrap","techLevel":"nocode"}' \\
  --max-time 120 2>&1 | sed 's/^data: //' | grep -v '^\\[DONE\\]' | python3 -c "
import sys, json
chunks = []
for line in sys.stdin:
    line = line.strip\(\)
    if not line: continue
    try:
        d = json.loads\(line\)
        if 'text' in d:
            chunks.append\(d['text']\)
    except: pass
full = ''.join\(chunks\)
# Extract JSON from code fence
start = full.find\('{'\)
end = full.rfind\('}'\) + 1
data = json.loads\(full[start:end]\)
print\('=== HEADLINE ==='\)
print\(data['headline']\)
print\(\)
for phase in data['phases']:
    tools = [t['name'] for t in phase['tools']]
    nocode_tools = [t['name'] for t in phase['tools'] if 'Lovable' in t['name'] or 'Bolt' in t['name'] or 'v0' in t['name']]
    print\(f\\"{phase['name']}: {', '.join\(tools\)}\\"\)
    if nocode_tools:
        print\(f\\"  >>> AI BUILDERS FOUND: {', '.join\(nocode_tools\)}\\"\)
print\(\)
print\('=== SCALABILITY / UPGRADES mentioning AI builders ==='\)
for s in data.get\('scalability', []\):
    if any\(x in str\(s\) for x in ['Lovable','Bolt','v0']\):
        print\(f\\"  {s['trigger']} → {s['upgradeTo']}\\"\)
for u in data.get\('upgrades', []\):
    if any\(x in str\(u\) for x in ['Lovable','Bolt','v0']\):
        print\(f\\"  {u['tool']} → {u['migrateTo']}\\"\)
" 2>&1)
